promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch in folder order after the archived working-context bridge reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates a repeated audit schema, mixed-source inventory shape, recurring conflict signatures, canon-authority gaps, and an uninterpreted SIM artifact tail that compress cleanly into smaller reusable audit packets.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The archived working-context bridge batch was used for ingestion and drift-policing context, Episode 01 was used for source-class layering, and the sims-evidence batch was used for SIM inventory-versus-evidence separation.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until this stronger adjacent read-log audit surface was reduced into smaller reusable packets.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The archived full-read-log parent batch plus the working-context, Episode 01, and sims-evidence anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable audit, conflict-signature, authority-gap, and SIM-inventory packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVED_READ_LOG_LEDGER_NONAUTHORITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the source as archived audit history without letting inventory presence act as doctrine.

candidate_items.name: UNIFORM_PER_DOCUMENT_AUDIT_SCHEMA_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest reusable audit mechanism independent of the specific logged documents.

candidate_items.name: MIXED_CORPUS_REQUIRES_SOURCE_CLASS_RESEPARATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest defense against mixed-source flattening while keeping the breadth inventory useful.

candidate_items.name: RECURRING_CONFLICT_SIGNATURE_SET_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the archive-era audit lens as a compact signature set rather than requiring the whole read log.

candidate_items.name: CANON_UNDECLARED_RICHNESS_AUTHORITY_GAP_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest caution against promoting richly specified archived docs by rhetorical weight alone.

candidate_items.name: SIM_ARTIFACT_INVENTORY_NOT_EVIDENCE_SYNTHESIS_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest source-class rule for the SIM tail without overreading the audit pass as evidence interpretation.

quarantined_items.name: LOGGED_DOCUMENT_PRESENCE_AS_CONTENT_ENDORSEMENT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Inventory presence in a full read log does not endorse or promote the logged documents.

quarantined_items.name: CONFLICT_COUNTS_AS_CURRENT_REPO_WIDE_POLICY_TRUTH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The conflict counts are archive-era signals from one audit pass, not automatic current global policy truth.

quarantined_items.name: MIXED_SOURCE_INVENTORY_AS_VALID_ACTIVE_MEMORY_SHAPE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The breadth inventory helps audit coverage but should not become a standing active-memory layout.

quarantined_items.name: SIM_RESULTS_LOG_AS_INTERPRETED_EVIDENCE_SURFACE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The SIM tail is mostly uninterpreted inventory in this surface rather than an evidence-analysis lane.

quarantined_items.name: ROOT_CONSTRAINT_LABEL_MISMATCH_AS_REPAIRED_STATE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The ledger records the naming mismatch; it does not repair the underlying artifacts.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest audit-only packets in the parent batch: the uniform schema, source-class reseparation rule, recurring conflict signatures, authority-gap caution, and SIM inventory posture.
They preserve the read log as archive-audit history without letting logged documents, conflict counts, or mixed-source breadth self-authorize into doctrine.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later archived-state synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain endorsement overreads, audit-count overreads, mixed-memory-shape overreads, or unresolved naming-debt collapses rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the working-context bridge batch, Episode 01 batch, and sims-evidence batch as nearby archived anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded archived read-log reduction pass.
